event.description:
REGISTER HERE FOR THIS FREE EVENT: http://bit.ly/2CmfasU

This event is Eastern Standard Time. Please adjust to your location. Event is on-line.

IBM is proud to present Virtual Community Day: Cloud Migration. This is a free online conference teaching technologists how to utilize Cloud Paks to help scale and improve their products.

During this conference, you’ll gain technical skills and insights into the 5 IBM Cloud Paks by watching live talks/demos from 25 industry-leading experts on three distinct tracks:

- Show & Tell: Deep-dive demo session covering the functionalities of IBM Cloud Paks
- Developer: Learn from IBM and partnered technologists about cloud-native development & serverless strategy
- Getting Started: Get best practices and guidance through case studies from IBM and their Partners

See the list of speakers here: https://cloudmigration.bemyapp.com/?utm_source=client&utm_medium=partner

Join us to learn more. This is an online Community event for Cloud Migration. Event is held in Eastern Standard Time.

REGISTER HERE: http://bit.ly/2CmfasU

Once you register you will be able to go back into the event to review recorded sessions.

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Community Day: Cloud Migration, Containers, Kubernetes, and Microservices

meetup_name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC
